title: GPU dropdown drops the SELECTED card when its stock flips unavailable
description: BUG (found live 2026-07-02 during MPI-177 verify, EU-RO-1 + RTX 2000 Ada, while CONNECTED): _buildGpuOptions filters options to availMap.has(id) || (autoRetry && unavailSet.has(id)) — the currently-selected cfg.gpuType is NOT force-included, so when RunPod stock for the selected card flips available:false the dropdown re-renders showing the Select GPU... placeholder even though cfg.gpuType is saved and a Pod is RUNNING on that card. Selection looks lost (it is not); it reappears whenever a later availability snapshot has the card back in stock. PRE-EXISTING logic (verbatim through MPI-177 extraction, was identical in MpiSettings.js). FIX: force-append the selected gpuType to gpuOptions when missing, labeled Unavailable right now, in js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiRunpodSettings/MpiRunpodSettings.js _buildGpuOptions. BRANCH: RunPod.
